response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrated C++ development on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains — the core requirements. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/prototype work (bachelor’s thesis) and non-financial embedded systems, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle usage, financial domain knowledge, or Windows-specific production systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows in financial systems
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle usage in capital markets context
Lacks fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets domain exposure
